summary: Plan-only inventory review found no security-sensitive refs and no duplicate/canonical family. None of the five open PRs has a complete merge preflight in the hydrated artifact; each is blocked by an item-specific human or proof gap rather than a cluster-wide ambiguity.

actions.reason: Active author-followup/status and missing merge preflight proof block a merge recommendation in plan mode.
The failed Real behavior proof blocks merge, and the artifact does not include enough failure detail to plan a concrete repair safely.
The PR appears narrow and passing, but missing mergeability and Codex /review proof block a merge_candidate recommendation.
Broad code delta, active author-followup signal, many unhydrated comments, and failing checks require maintainer review before repair or merge planning.
Despite passing checks, the dirty-candidate/refactor-only labels and broad compatibility/session-state surface require maintainer judgment before any merge or repair action.
